info.title: CodeBleach
info.description: Industrial-grade multi-language code obfuscator for sharing code with AI assistants. AST-aware obfuscation for C#, VB.NET, T-SQL, JavaScript, COBOL, JCL, VBScript/VBA, Oracle SQL/PL-SQL, and F#. Renames all identifiers, removes comments, obfuscates strings, and renames files so compromised LLM context reveals no organizational fingerprint. Supports selective --scope filtering to obfuscate only specific code domains (database, mainframe, dotnet, web) with cross-language delegation.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
CodeBleach — Industrial-grade code obfuscation for AI-safe sharing.

Quick Recipes:
  codebleach .                                 Obfuscate current directory (Level 2)
  codebleach sanitize ./src                    Obfuscate ./src directory
  codebleach sanitize ./src --scope database   Only obfuscate SQL/database code
  codebleach sanitize ./src --scope mainframe  Only obfuscate COBOL/JCL code
  codebleach sanitize ./src --level 1          Regex-only sanitization (fast)
  codebleach sanitize ./src --dry-run          Preview without modifying files
  codebleach sanitize ./src --verify           Build after obfuscation to verify
  codebleach restore                           Restore from manifest in current dir

Scope Groups:
  database   = tsql, db2sql, oraclesql
  mainframe  = cobol, jcl, mainframe-utility
  dotnet     = csharp, vbnet, fsharp
  web        = javascript
  scripting  = vbscript

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Verify that a directory compiles successfully
